note: Hand-maintained register of AI / data-centre infrastructure build-outs by state. status: operational | construction | announced.

projects.name: AirTrunk SYD2 (Lane Cove West)
projects.notes: Largest operating data centre project in NSW.

projects.name: Mayfield Energy Precinct Data Centre
projects.notes: Largest planned data centre project in NSW at 1 GW, anchoring the Hunter as a post-industrial AI energy precinct.

projects.name: Western Sydney corridor (Eastern Creek / Kemps Creek)
projects.operator: Multiple — AirTrunk, NEXTDC, Amazon, Goodman, CDC
projects.notes: One of the most active data centre precincts in Asia-Pacific. NSW pipeline overall: ~44 projects / 11.4 GW as of Q1 2026.

projects.name: Microsoft hyperscale expansion (A$25bn national program)
projects.notes: Part of Microsoft's A$25bn AI infrastructure, security and skills commitment through 2029.

projects.name: AWS expansion + 11 renewable energy projects
projects.location: Sydney region + solar/wind across NSW, QLD, VIC
projects.notes: A$20bn 2025–2029 program pairing data centre capacity with 11 renewable projects across three states.

projects.name: NEXTDC M-series (Melbourne)
projects.notes: Flagship Victorian AI-ready campuses; Victoria's data centre energy demand nearly doubled in the year to early 2026.

projects.name: Firmus 'Project Southgate' AI factories
projects.notes: Hydro-powered immersion-cooled GPU campuses; US$505M raise (2026) funds expansion ahead of a mooted ASX IPO.

projects.name: CDC Canberra campuses (Fyshwick / Hume / Eastern Creek)
projects.notes: Sovereign-certified campuses hosting government and defence AI workloads; 7 projects in the NSW/ACT pipeline.

projects.name: NEXTDC B2/B3 (Brisbane)
projects.notes: Queensland's AI-ready colocation anchor; further QLD capacity in NEXTDC's 8-project national pipeline.

projects.name: NEXTDC P1/P2 (Perth)
projects.notes: WA's main AI-capable colocation hub, positioned on subsea routes to Asia (and the Oman-Australia cable).

projects.name: NEXTDC A1/A2 (Adelaide)
projects.notes: Anchors SA's defence-and-space adjacent AI workloads (Lot Fourteen precinct ecosystem).

projects.name: NEXTDC D1 (Darwin)
projects.notes: Edge/gateway facility on the Darwin–Jakarta–Singapore cable route; NT's beachhead for northern-Australia AI infrastructure.

projects.name: IDA fast-track cohort — 15 projects, A$51.9bn
projects.notes: Projects endorsed by the Investment Delivery Authority (27 Mar 2026) for prioritised approvals — the federal fast lane for the AI build-out.
